# AI Context for @json-express/queue-memory

An in-memory background task queue.

## Setup
```typescript
import { QueueMemory } from '@json-express/queue-memory';
kernel.registerQueueAdapter(new QueueMemory());
```

## AI Instruction
- Jobs are executed in the same Node.js process and lost if the server crashes.
- Do not use for mission-critical jobs in production; use a Redis-based adapter instead.
